segments.original_text: 空中後ろで着地狩り継続

segments.text: They're not using down B at all, huh?
segments.original_text: なんか下B一切使わないですね

segments.text: Yeah, down B is pretty useful
What else did down B have?
segments.original_text: 下Bほかになんかあったっけ

segments.text: Like counters and stuff though, right?
segments.original_text: カウンターとかですけどね

full_text: Continuing to juggle with bair. They're not using down B at all, huh? Yeah, down B is pretty useful. No way, is it different? What else did down B have? Like counters and stuff though, right? Alright, airdodging back

corrections.rule: kanji homophone (うちゅう→くうちゅう)

corrections.original: 下火ほっかりなんかあったっけ
corrections.corrected: 下Bほかになんかあったっけ
